intro: Industrial and energy sectors bore the brunt of OT-security incidents between April 13 and April 28, 2026, with critical infrastructure globally affected across North America, Europe, and the Middle East. Threat actors APT33 and Pro-Russia Hacktivists were observed, while CVE-2026-24032 (CVSS 7.3) was among the top vulnerabilities. The nine articles in this archive cover a severity mix of one critical, three high, one medium, and four informational reports.
